content:
Introducing Seedance Video Creative Studio, an advanced AI skill that transforms your visual and textual inputs into compelling video content. This autonomous creative director analyzes images, expands copy, matches camera work, validates quality, and generates videos via API when users provide images and text.

How Seedance Works

Seedance operates as your personal video creative director. When you provide materials—whether images, copy, both, or even just an image with no words—it autonomously decides how to turn them into a creative, memorable Seedance video prompt, calling the API to generate when appropriate.

Unlike template-based systems, Seedance has no fixed process or mandatory step order. Your judgment IS the process. The system makes autonomous decisions about what to analyze first, whether to search for trending prompts, how many iterations to perform, and when to converge on a final output.

Critical Language Requirement

All prompts generated by Seedance must be in Chinese. While your conversation with the user can be in any language, the final video prompt output must always be Chinese, as Seedance understands Chinese best.

Core Capabilities

Multimodal Vision

Seedance directly analyzes images to understand scene composition, subject matter, shot scale, composition dynamics, color palette, and artistic style. This visual analysis forms the foundation for all creative decisions.

Creative Ideation

The system can diverge multiple creative directions from a single image, then pick the most interesting one. Rather than generating predictable outputs, Seedance seeks creative angles that will capture viewer attention.

Copy Expansion

Vague copy gets expanded into full prompts with detailed camera work, lighting specifications, rhythm descriptions, and stylistic elements. The system transforms simple concepts into comprehensive video directions.

Web Search Integration

Seedance can search trending prompt patterns and adapt phrasing into current copy styles, ensuring outputs remain contemporary and relevant to current creative trends.

Vocabulary Selection

The system pulls terms from reference.md cinematography and style vocabulary, never inventing terms. This ensures professional-quality output that aligns with industry standards.

Image Diagnosis

Seedance checks resolution (300–6000px), aspect ratio (0.4–2.5), and composition issues. It proactively flags camera risks or crop/adjust with Python preprocessing when needed.

Pairing Validation

The system judges whether image + prompt + camera work are harmonious, fixing mismatches locally to ensure cohesive final outputs.

Creativity Review

After writing a prompt, Seedance repeatedly asks itself “is this prompt interesting?” If not good enough, it scraps and redoes the work. Better to revise two extra rounds than output a mediocre prompt.

Creativity Standards

Seedance maintains high creative standards through a rigorous review process. After writing a prompt, the system doesn’t rush to generate. Instead, it passes the creativity gate first by asking critical questions:

  • Is it memorable? What will the viewer remember after watching? If the answer is “nothing” — rewrite.
  • Is there surprise? All expected visuals = boring. A good prompt has at least one twist, contrast, exaggeration, or unusual detail.
  • Is there emotion? Purely descriptive visuals have no impact. Add emotional arcs: tension → release, calm → explosion, warmth → twist.
  • Is there narrative? Even in 5 seconds, there should be an A → B change, not a static showcase.

If the prompt doesn’t meet these standards, Seedance iterates — changing angle, swapping style, adding conflict, restructuring narrative — until the system thinks “this is interesting.”

Handling Image-Only Inputs

When users drop an image without any accompanying copy, Seedance enters its most creative mode. The system:

  1. Reads the image: Analyzes scene, mood, story potential, and visual tension
  2. Diverges creative directions: From the image, brainstorms 2–3 completely different angles
  3. Picks the most interesting direction and develops it into a full prompt
  4. Alternatively, presents directions for the user to choose

For example, given a coffee cup photo, Seedance might generate:

  • Healing: Steam rising from morning coffee slowly morphs into memory fragments
  • Commercial: Coffee beans fall from the sky, burst apart, and reassemble into a latte in 3D
  • Mystery: The patterns on the coffee surface slowly become a map, camera pushes in to enter another world

Even in this mode, Seedance passes the creativity review when developing — “it runs” is not enough, it needs to be “interesting.”

Quality Redlines

Seedance maintains strict quality standards:

  • Prompts must be in Chinese — ready to paste directly into Jimeng (即梦)
  • @ references use only @图片1~@图片9, @视频1~@视频3, @音频1~@音频3, each with purpose noted
  • Distinguish “reference” (borrow style/motion) from “edit” (modify the original)
  • No realistic human face materials
  • Camera/style terms from reference.md vocabulary only — never invent terms
  • Dialogue in quotes, tagged with character and emotion

Platform Specifications

Seedance works within specific platform constraints:

  • Images: jpeg/png/webp/bmp/tiff/gif, ≤9, each <30 MB
  • Videos: mp4/mov, ≤3, total 2–15s, each <50 MB
  • Audio: mp3/wav, ≤3, total ≤15s, each <15 MB
  • Mixed: Total ≤12 files
  • Output: 2.0: 4–15s; 1.x: 4‒12s; 2K resolution, native audio

API Generation

The system uses scripts/seedance.py to call the Volcengine Ark API. Script defaults to Seedance 2.0, but falls back to —model doubao-seedance-1-5-pro-251215 if 2.0 API is unavailable or model errors occur.

Available Models

Model Model ID Capabilities
Seedance 2.0 (default) doubao-seedance-2-0-260128 Text/image/video/audio multimodal, motion replication, multi-shot narrative
Seedance 1.5 Pro doubao-seedance-1-5-pro-251215 Text/image-to-video, native audio, draft preview, flex offline
Seedance 1.0 Pro doubao-seedance-1-0-pro-250528 Text/image-to-video, first/last frame, precise frame count
Seedance 1.0 Pro Fast doubao-seedance-1-0-pro-fast-251015 Text/image-to-video, speed optimized
Seedance 1.0 Lite I2V doubao-seedance-1-0-lite-i2v-250428 Multi-reference images ([图1][图2] syntax)

Prerequisites

Before using the API, set your environment variable:

export ARK_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"

Usage Examples

Text-to-video (2.0 default model):

python3 scripts/seedance.py create --prompt "提示词" --ratio 16:9 --duration 5 --wait --download ~/Desktop

First frame image (use adaptive ratio with images):

python3 scripts/seedance.py create --prompt "提示词" --image img.jpg --ratio adaptive --duration 5 --wait --download ~/Desktop

First + last frame:

python3 scripts/seedance.py create --prompt "提示词" --image first.jpg --last-frame last.jpg --ratio adaptive --duration 5 --wait --download ~/Desktop

Video reference / motion replication (2.0):

python3 scripts/seedance.py create --prompt "提示词" --video motion_ref.mp4 --wait --download ~/Desktop

Audio reference / beat-sync (2.0):

python3 scripts/seedance.py create --prompt "提示词" --audio bgm.mp3 --wait --download ~/Desktop

Multimodal mix (image + video + audio, 2.0):

python3 scripts/seedance.py create --prompt "提示词" --image img.jpg --video ref.mp4 --audio bgm.mp3 --ratio adaptive --wait --download ~/Desktop

Auto duration (model decides 4-15s, 1.5 Pro / 2.0):

python3 scripts/seedance.py create --prompt "提示词" --duration -1 --wait --download ~/Desktop

Draft preview (low-cost, confirm then generate final, 1.5 Pro):

python3 scripts/seedance.py create --prompt "提示词" --image img.jpg --draft

Conclusion

Seedance Video Creative Studio represents a significant advancement in AI-powered video generation. By combining multimodal analysis, creative ideation, and rigorous quality standards, it produces video prompts that are not just technically sound but genuinely creative and memorable.

Whether you’re creating short dramas, advertisements, or artistic video content, Seedance provides the creative direction and technical execution needed to bring your vision to life. Its autonomous decision-making process ensures that each output is tailored to the specific materials provided, rather than forcing inputs into predetermined templates.

The system’s emphasis on creativity over mere functionality sets it apart from other video generation tools. By maintaining high standards for memorability, surprise, emotion, and narrative, Seedance ensures that every video it helps create has the potential to capture and hold viewer attention.

Skill can be found at: https://github.com/openclaw/skills/tree/main/skills/zhanghaonan777/seedance2-skill/SKILL.md

title: Seedance Video Creative Studio: AI-Powered Video Generation Skill
